title: OpenStax World History Volume 2
description: A source card for the OpenStax World History Volume 2 textbook.

pages.text: OpenStax World History Volume 2 surveys global history from about 1400 to the present, including empire, revolution, industrialization, nationalism, war, decolonization, and globalization.
Use this source as background for older students comparing regions, causes, consequences, and historical interpretations across modern world history.
OpenStax books carry Creative Commons licenses. Check the linked book page for the exact license before mirroring chapters, figures, or ancillary materials.
